reason: Verified that the agent can open a browser, navigate to a URL, and retrieve the page title
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — page loaded successfully showing the Super Agent interface with three agents listed in the sidebar
Found the "QA-20260415-203412-oi3a" agent in the sidebar and clicked it — agent view opened successfully with message input field ready
Typed and sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." using Ctrl+Enter — message was submitted successfully
Waited 5 seconds for agent response — agent completed the task in 9 seconds and returned response with page title information

Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" — response clearly states: "The page title is 'Example Domain'. It's a simple page with a heading and a 'Learn more' link." and screenshot confirms the complete response with tool call cards showing successful browser operations
